title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal model for local agentic workflows on consumer laptops with unified encoder-free architecture supporting text, vision, and audio. The model includes Multi-Token Prediction for inference latency reduction and integrates with local ecosystem tools including LiteRT-LM, Ollama, AI Edge Gallery, and agent frameworks like Hermes.
